query: Our strategic steel supplier MetalWorks just had a credit rating downgrade from BBB to BB. Revenue down 18% YoY and margin at 2.1%. What's the risk assessment?
NorthernTech's Tier 2 raw material supplier in Shenzhen filed for CVA. They say they have 45 days of stock. What should we do about this Tier 2 cascade risk?
I just saw in the news that our sole-source supplier for custom electronics has had a fire at their only production facility. What's our exposure and what actions do I take?
Can you produce the CPO weekly risk summary? I need to see all monitored vendors plotted by risk level with any new alerts from this week
our sole-source supplier has been late-filing their statutory accounts for 3 months now. Is that a financial distress signal we should worry about?
The UK government just added new export controls affecting rare earth materials. Three of our suppliers source from affected regions. What's the geopolitical risk impact?
We have a sole-source vendor for a critical component who only does GBP 15K/year with us but we have no alternative and qualification takes 9 months. What risk tier should they be?
I need to check whether our Tier 1 strategic vendors have Tier 2 supplier mapping in place. Which ones are we flying blind on?
Our supplier in eastern Turkey is reporting production disruptions due to regional instability. They supply 30% of our annual packaging volume. Assess the country risk
Can you monitor for financial distress signals on our top 10 strategic vendors? I want a risk dashboard covering credit ratings, revenue trends, and DSO for each
We want to onboard a new packaging supplier — do a full vendor assessment covering commercial, operational, financial, compliance, strategic, and geopolitical dimensions
Reconcile this invoice against the PO and goods receipt — there's a price variance on 3 line items
Review carrier performance for our UK-to-EU lanes — I need OTD rates and cost per kg by carrier
Analyze our procurement spend by category — where are the consolidation opportunities?
We're considering opening a DC in Poland. Model the network scenarios comparing single vs dual warehouse setup
Draft a corrective action request to Brenntag about their declining delivery performance
Generate the weekly supply chain brief for the CPO with all sections
Help me classify vendors using the Kraljic matrix and assign them to tiers for review frequency
What's the market benchmark price for corrugated board packaging in the UK?
Write a supply assurance request letter to our critical vendor asking them to confirm production capacity for the next 90 days
